NKJV.1: The LORD reigns, He is clothed with majesty; The LORD is clothed,  He has girded Himself with strength. Surely the world is established, so that it cannot be moved.
NKJV.2: Your throne is established from of old; You are from everlasting.
NKJV.3: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, The floods have lifted up their voice; The floods lift up their waves.
NKJV.4: The LORD on high is mightier Than the noise of many waters, Than the mighty waves of the sea.
NKJV.5: Your testimonies are very sure; Holiness adorns Your house, O LORD, forever.

KJV.1: The LORD<S>3068</S> reigneth<S>4427</S>, he is clothed<S>3847</S> with majesty<S>1348</S>; the LORD<S>3068</S> is clothed<S>3847</S> with strength<S>5797</S>, wherewith he hath girded<S>247</S> himself: the world<S>8398</S> also is stablished<S>3559</S>, that it cannot be moved<S>4131</S>.
KJV.2: Thy throne<S>3678</S> is established<S>3559</S> of old<S>227</S>: thou art from everlasting<S>5769</S>. <sup>of old: Heb. from then</sup>
KJV.3: The floods<S>5104</S> have lifted up<S>5375</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>, the floods<S>5104</S> have lifted up<S>5375</S> their voice<S>6963</S>; the floods<S>5104</S> lift up<S>5375</S> their waves<S>1796</S>.
KJV.4: The LORD<S>3068</S> on high<S>4791</S> is mightier<S>117</S> than the noise<S>6963</S> of many<S>7227</S> waters<S>4325</S>, yea, than the mighty<S>117</S> waves<S>4867</S> of the sea<S>3220</S>.
KJV.5: Thy testimonies<S>5713</S> are very<S>3966</S> sure<S>539</S>: holiness<S>6944</S> becometh<S>4998</S> thine house<S>1004</S>, O LORD<S>3068</S>, for ever<S>753</S> <S>3117</S>. <sup>for ever: Heb. to length of days</sup>

ESV.1: The LORD reigns; he is robed in majesty; the LORD is robed; he has put on strength as his belt. Yes, the world is established; it shall never be moved.
ESV.2: Your throne is established from of old; you are from everlasting.
ESV.3: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift up their roaring.
ESV.4: Mightier than the thunders of many waters, mightier than the waves of the sea, the LORD on high is mighty!
ESV.5: Your decrees are very trustworthy; holiness befits your house, O LORD, forevermore.

NASB.1: The LORD reigns, He is clothed with majesty; The LORD has clothed and girded Himself with strength; Indeed, the world is firmly established, it will not be moved.
NASB.2: Your throne is established from of old; You are from everlasting.
NASB.3: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, The floods have lifted up their voice, The floods lift up their pounding waves.
NASB.4: More than the sounds of many waters, [Than] the mighty breakers of the sea, The LORD on high is mighty.
NASB.5: Your testimonies are fully confirmed; Holiness befits Your house, O LORD, forevermore.

NLT.1:
The LORD is king! He is robed in majesty.
Indeed, the LORD is robed in majesty and armed with strength.
The world stands firm
and cannot be shaken.
NLT.2:
Your throne, O LORD, has stood from time immemorial.
You yourself are from the everlasting past.
NLT.3:
The floods have risen up, O LORD.
The floods have roared like thunder;
the floods have lifted their pounding waves.
NLT.4:
But mightier than the violent raging of the seas,
mightier than the breakers on the shore —
the LORD above is mightier than these!
NLT.5:
Your royal laws cannot be changed.
Your reign, O LORD, is holy forever and ever.

WEB.1: Yahweh reigns! He is clothed with majesty! Yahweh is armed with strength. The world also is established. It can’t be moved.
WEB.2: Your throne is established from long ago. You are from everlasting.
WEB.3: The floods have lifted up, Yahweh, the floods have lifted up their voice. The floods lift up their waves.
WEB.4: Above the voices of many waters, the mighty breakers of the sea, Yahweh on high is mighty.
WEB.5: Your statutes stand firm. Holiness adorns your house, Yahweh, forever more.

CSB17.1:
The LORD reigns! He is robed in majesty;
the LORD is robed, enveloped in strength.
The world is firmly established;
it cannot be shaken. ⓓ
CSB17.2:
Your throne has been established
from the beginning; [1]
you are from eternity. ⓔ
CSB17.3:
The floods have lifted up, LORD,
the floods have lifted up their voice;
the floods lift up their pounding waves. ⓕ
CSB17.4:
Greater than the roar of a huge torrent —
the mighty breakers of the sea —
the LORD on high is majestic. ⓖ
CSB17.5:
LORD, your testimonies are completely reliable; ⓗ
holiness adorns your house
for all the days to come. ⓘ

AMP.1:
The LORD reigns, He is clothed with majesty and splendor;
The LORD has clothed and encircled Himself with strength;
the world is firmly established, it cannot be moved.
AMP.2:
Your throne is established from of old;
You are from everlasting.
AMP.3:
The floods have lifted up, O LORD,
The floods have lifted up their voice;
The floods lift up their pounding waves.
AMP.4:
More than the sounds of many waters,
More than the mighty breakers of the sea,
The LORD on high is mighty.
AMP.5:
Your precepts are fully confirmed and completely reliable;
Holiness adorns Your house,
O LORD, forever.

MSG.1:
God is King, robed and ruling,
God is robed and surging with strength.
And yes, the world is firm, immovable,
MSG.3:
Sea storms are up, God,
Sea storms wild and roaring,
Sea storms with thunderous breakers.
MSG.4:
Stronger than wild sea storms,
Mightier than sea-storm breakers,
Mighty God rules from High Heaven.
MSG.5:
What you say goes—it always has.
"Beauty" and "Holy" mark your palace rule,
God, to the very end of time.

NIV.1:
Psalm 93
The Lord reigns, he is robed in majesty;
the Lord is robed in majesty
and is armed with strength.
The world is firmly established;
it cannot be moved.
NIV.2:
Your throne was established long ago;
you are from all eternity.
NIV.3:
The seas have lifted up, O Lord,
the seas have lifted up their voice;
the seas have lifted up their pounding waves.
NIV.4:
Mightier than the thunder of the great waters,
mightier than the breakers of the sea—
the Lord on high is mighty.
NIV.5:
Your statutes stand firm;
holiness adorns your house
for endless days, O Lord.

NRSVCE.1:
The LORD is king, he is robed in majesty;
the LORD is robed, he is girded with strength.
He has established the world; it shall never be moved;
NRSVCE.2:
your throne is established from of old;
you are from everlasting.
NRSVCE.3:
The floods have lifted up, O LORD,
the floods have lifted up their voice;
the floods lift up their roaring.
NRSVCE.4:
More majestic than the thunders of mighty waters,
more majestic than the waves of the sea,
majestic on high is the LORD!
NRSVCE.5:
Your decrees are very sure;
holiness befits your house,
O LORD, forevermore.

NET.1: The LORD reigns! He is robed in majesty, the LORD is robed, he wears strength around his waist. Indeed, the world is established, it cannot be moved.
NET.2: Your throne has been secure from ancient times; you have always been king.
NET.3: The waves roar, O LORD, the waves roar, the waves roar and crash.
NET.4: Above the sound of the surging water, and the mighty waves of the sea, the LORD sits enthroned in majesty.
NET.5: The rules you set down are completely reliable. Holiness aptly adorns your house, O LORD, forever.
